Our Story

Two worlds,
one language.

A physician who heals by day and a restless entrepreneur who builds by day — and both who breathe music when the world quiets down. Together, they are The Singing Sheep.

Born from a shared love for melody and storytelling, this Bengaluru-based duo has been creating covers, originals, and cinematic compositions that have found their way into Kannada cinema and the hearts of listeners across India.

See Our Work →
Dr. Shruthi MK
Vocalist · Composer
A doctor by profession, Shruthi brings a rare emotional intelligence to her voice. She has lent her vocals to Devanobba Jaadugaara alongside Vasuki Vaibhav and Vijay Prakash, and has been the soul of the duo since its beginning.
@dr.shruthi_mk_official
▼

Shruthi was born into a family filled with music. From her early age, she learnt Carnatic classical music from her mother, Vid. Smt. Sharada Shashidhar. Her mother was a renowned artist on AIR (All India Radio) and would perform at various concerts, where Shruthi would also participate as a backing vocalist. Shruthi would also perform at various events as a child prodigy.

While she went on to pursue medicine as a career, her passion for music stayed strong and manifested as one-half of The Singing Sheep. Today, Dr Shruthi MK uses her voice and her keen sense of music to compose music as well.

Deepak Nayak
Music Director · Producer
An entrepreneur with a keen sense of creating intricate compositions, Deepak is set to debut as Music Director for Devanobba Jaadugaara. He previously composed "Cauvery Kaneyadalu" for the film Chilli Chicken (2024).
@deepaknayak_official
▼

Deepak comes from a humble background in the temple town of Udupi. He developed a keen interest towards music at an early age and would spend most of his time singing and playing his keyboard, trying to imitate the tunes he heard on TV.

With no formal training in music, Deepak still continued on his journey to explore various facets of music. He became a self-taught drummer and DJ, later transitioning into mixing and composing. His quest led him to work with renowned musicians, which served as a foundation for him becoming one-half of The Singing Sheep today.

Deepak's compositions delve into modern soundscapes while preserving the roots of traditional sounds.
